description.en: On-chain demo track for Solana account model, transactions, PDAs, Anchor account constraints, and CPI basics.
description.pt: Trilha demo on-chain para modelo de contas Solana, transacoes, PDAs, constraints no Anchor e fundamentos de CPI.
description.es: Ruta demo on-chain para modelo de cuentas Solana, transacciones, PDAs, restricciones en Anchor y fundamentos de CPI.

title: Solana Accounts
description: Understand Solana account fields and return key account properties.
content: Complete the function to return lamports, owner, data length and executable flag.

tests.name: challenge

title: Instructions and Transactions
description: Build a transfer instruction descriptor for SOL transfer semantics.
content: Return system program id, from, to and lamports values.

tests.name: challenge

title: Program Derived Addresses (PDAs)
description: Describe deterministic seed inputs for enrollment PDA derivation.
content: Return three seeds and their count for enrollment PDA patterns.

tests.name: challenge

title: Anchor Account Constraints
description: Model basic ownership and writable validation logic used by account constraints.
content: Compute ownerMatches, writable and final isValid booleans.

title: Cross Program Invocation Basics
description: Plan CPI calls by identifying target program, instruction and signer needs.
content: Build and return a simple CPI plan object.
